kicker: ET LEVEL II // FERROMAGNETIC PROPERTY MEASUREMENT

beats.narration: Through the flaw-detection arc, permeability was noise you saturated away on steel. Property measurement flips it — permeability becomes the signal.

payload.title: PERMEABILITY IS THE SIGNAL
payload.sub: The villain of flaw work becomes the measurement.

beats.narration: The same microstructure that sets hardness pins magnetic domain walls. So heat treat, carbon, and cold work all rewrite the magnetic properties together.
Read it on the hysteresis loop. A hardened part draws a wide, flat loop; an annealed part a tall, narrow one.

payload.heading: The loop carries the story
payload.note: HARD = WIDE LOOP · ANNEALED = NARROW LOOP

beats.narration: The instrument is a comparator bridge — matched coils, a verified reference in one, the test part in the other. Matched parts null; any difference unbalances it.
So demagnetize, equalize temperature, run low frequency, build the window from verified parts. The bridge reports difference — the laboratory proves the cause.

payload.sub: The meter never gets the final word on a borderline part.
